tasks.label: Windows: Compile + Copy Resources
tasks.command: echo This task is Windows-only. Use ./run.sh on Linux.

args: if not exist out\vscode-bin mkdir out\vscode-bin && dir /s /b src\*.java > sources.txt && javac -cp "lib/*" -d out\vscode-bin @sources.txt && del sources.txt && xcopy /e /i /y resources out\vscode-bin >nul
